decisions.summary: Create 5 beads covering all missing inspector parity items
Reuse existing inspector components (ContainerSection, ReviewPipelineSection) where possible to avoid duplication

hazards.summary: OverviewTab uses inline styles while inspector uses Tailwind classes — mixing may look inconsistent
hazards.mitigation: Style ContainerSection and pipeline to match command deck aesthetic using inline styles, or wrap inspector components

resumePoint.description: Implement bead workspace-8k4p (Fix Agent tile: show runtime, uptime, workspace path). Thread agent/issue props through ZoneCOverview to OverviewTab, then fix Agent tile to show actual runtime harness, uptime duration, and workspace path.

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-953 implementation. Created 5 beads. Rebased onto latest main. No existing continue file.
